name: United States qualification review seed pack
change_note: Initial country seed pack with routing requirements only; official sources must be checked per case.

regulator_map.notes: Verify product classification, facility/registration, labeling, claims, and import route when relevant.
Verify radio/EMC authorization route for wireless and electronic products.
Verify consumer product safety, testing, certification, tracking label, and recall constraints.
Verify importer, entry, tariff, and admissibility requirements.
Verify trademark owner, status, class, and territory when brand rights affect the decision.

checklist_hints: Confirm whether the applicant or route needs a US importer, agent, responsible party, tax/payee record, or platform-specific US seller eligibility evidence.
Route food, supplement, cosmetic, medical, pesticide, wireless, battery, toy, and child-oriented products to current official regulator checks.
Verify US labeling, claims, restricted product, and recall/safety status before approval.

requirements.requirement: Identify the applicable US regulator or registry for the product category and verify current official requirements.
requirements.decision_effect: Do not approve regulated US categories until the applicable official source or registry path is verified.
requirements.notes: Seed routing requirement; not a substitute for current FDA/FCC/CPSC/EPA/USDA/CBP or other official checks.

requirements.requirement: Check US label language, warning, origin, nutrition/ingredient, safety, and claims rules for the exact product category.
requirements.decision_effect: Unsupported regulated claims or missing required warnings normally require more information or human escalation.
requirements.notes: High-risk claims include disease treatment, antimicrobial, child safety, organic, environmental, and performance claims.

gaps: Add current official source IDs for FDA food/cosmetics/supplements routes.
Add current official source IDs for FCC/CPSC/EPA/USDA category paths.
Add golden cases for approve, request_more_info, and reject/escalate outcomes before marking validated.
